title: identity — feature keys
description: Identity contributes NO tenant-facing UI features directly — the tenant surface is owned by `identity/auth`. The keys below are consumed by identity/auth to gate the enrolment / recovery flows.

features.description: Base identity capability. Always on. Presence of this feature key indicates identity-service is reachable.
Composite of the mfa_totp / mfa_webauthn / mfa_recovery_codes entitlements. When any is on, this feature key is exposed.
Checks every new password against publicly-known breaches. Silent gate — shows an error only when a breached password is submitted.
Refuses new passwords that match any of the last N. Silent gate.
Doubles lockout duration on consecutive lockouts within an hour. Silent gate.
Sends SuspiciousLoginNotification on novel-IP + high-velocity lockout events.
